name: Thyme Au Gratin Potatoes
recipeIngredient: 10 3/4 oz Can cream of celery soup
6 medium Potatoes, cooked, peeled and diced
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 350 degrees Fahrenheit. Grease a 1 1/2-quart casserole dish.
In the greased casserole dish, combine 1 cup of the shredded cheddar cheese, sour cream, cream of celery soup, dried thyme leaves, and black pepper; stir until well mixed.
Stir in the diced potatoes and sliced green onions. Cover the dish with foil.
Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes.
2. In a small bowl, combine the crushed seasoned croutons with the remaining 1/4 cup shredded cheddar cheese.
Remove the foil from the casserole dish and sprinkle the crouton mixture evenly over the top of the potatoes.
Return to the oven and bake uncovered for an additional 10 to 15 minutes, or until bubbly and golden brown.
Nutrition Information Per Serving:
160 Calories, 8 g Fat, 290 mg Sodium
